# gstack-deps — relocated Node dependencies

`package.json` + `package-lock.json` were moved out of `~/.claude/skills/`
(P5-T12) so the skills tree carries no Node manifests or `node_modules`. Deps
(`playwright`, `sharp`, `pdf-lib`, `pptxgenjs`) are used by the locked gstack
`setup` skill.

## Install

    cd ~/.claude/vendor/gstack-deps && npm ci

## Resolution (gstack node tools use bare require())

    export NODE_PATH="$HOME/.claude/vendor/gstack-deps/node_modules"

The P6 installer sets this for gstack skill invocations. `node_modules` is
gitignored and regenerated by `npm ci` here — never committed. The old
`skills/node_modules` (gitignored, 0 tracked files) can be removed manually.
